creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
anray       2008-07-18 21:03:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/masqmail        Makefile pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    mail/masqmail/files  masqmail.in 
  Removed files:
    mail/masqmail/files  masqmail.sh 
  Log:
  - Respect NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES
  - files/masqmail.sh -> files/masqmail.in
    itectu@: no more .sh
    dougb@: move load_config above variables checks
  - use PORTDOCS
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/125652
  Submitted by:   Philip M. Gollucci pgollucci at p6m7g8.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.14      +9 -9      ports/mail/masqmail/Makefile
